mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT h.homework_code, h.course_id, c.title AS course_name, h.title AS homework_title, h.start_date, h.end_date, u.name AS teacher_name, s.submission_code AS submission_code, s.status, s.score, s.feedback, s.date AS submit_date,
-- 🔥 강사 과제 첨부파일 f.file_id, f.name AS file_name
FROM homework h JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN tb_userinfo u ON u.loginID = h.loginID
LEFT JOIN submission s ON s.homework_code = h.homework_code AND s.loginID = #{loginId}
-- 🔥 여기부터가 추가된 핵심 LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.homework_code = h.homework_code AND hf.type = 'HOMEWORK'
LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id
ORDER BY h.start_date DESC

SELECT DISTINCT h.homework_code, h.course_id, c.title AS course_name,
h.title AS homework_title, h.content AS content, h.start_date, h.end_date,
u.name AS teacher_name, h.loginID AS teacher,
-- 🔥 강사 과제 첨부파일 f.file_id, f.name AS file_name, f.logical_path AS file_path
FROM homework h JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN tb_userinfo u ON u.loginID = h.loginID
-- 🔥 여기 추가 LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.homework_code = h.homework_code AND hf.type = 'HOMEWORK'
LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id
WHERE h.homework_code = #{homework_code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO homework_file (type, homework_code, submission_code, file_id) VALUES ('STUDENT', #{homework_code}, #{submission_code}, #{file_id})
mapper.select:
SELECT s.submission_code, s.homework_code, s.loginID, s.date AS submit_date, s.score, s.feedback, s.status,
h.title AS homework_title, h.content AS content, h.start_date, h.end_date,
c.title AS course_name, u.name AS teacher_name,
f.file_id, f.name AS file_name, f.logical_path AS file_path
FROM submission s JOIN homework h ON s.homework_code = h.homework_code JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id JOIN tb_userinfo u ON h.loginID = u.loginID
LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.submission_code = s.submission_code LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id
WHERE s.submission_code = #{submissionCode}

SELECT s.submission_code, s.homework_code, s.loginID, s.date AS submit_date, s.status, s.score, s.feedback, s.appeal_content, s.appeal_reply AS appeal_reply, h.title AS homework_title, h.start_date, h.end_date,
c.title AS course_name, u.name AS teacher_name,
f.file_id, f.name AS file_name, f.logical_path AS file_path FROM submission s JOIN homework h ON s.homework_code = h.homework_code JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id JOIN tb_userinfo u ON h.loginID = u.loginID LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.submission_code = s.submission_code LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id WHERE s.loginID = #{loginId} ORDER BY s.date DESC
